overview.short: Bhushangad is a hill fort in the Khatav taluk of the Satara district of Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Bhushangad is a hill fort in the Khatav taluk of the Satara district of Maharashtra, India. It is oval in shape, and rises 600 feet (180 m) above the surrounding plain. Its top is flat, and measures to be about 300 square yards (250 m2) in area. The origins of the fort are unclear.

topPlaces.name: Mhasurne
topPlaces.description: Mhasurne is a village in Khatav taluk and Satara district, Maharashtra, India. It is located 64 km to the east of the district headquarters, Satara, 21 km from Khatav, 30 km from Karad, and 285 km from the state capital Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Aundh State
topPlaces.description: Aundh State was a Maratha princely state during the British Raj, in the Deccan States Agency division of the Bombay Presidency. The Principality of Aundh covered an area of 1298 square kilometers with a population of 88,762 in 1941.

topPlaces.name: Aundh, Satara
topPlaces.description: Aundh is a town in India 26 mi. southeast of Satara.

items.note: Mhasurne is a village in Khatav taluk and Satara district, Maharashtra, India. It is located 64 km to the east of the district headquarters, Satara, 21 km from Khatav, 30 km from Karad, and 285 km from the state capital Mumbai.

Aundh State was a Maratha princely state during the British Raj, in the Deccan States Agency division of the Bombay Presidency. The Principality of Aundh covered an area of 1298 square kilometers with a population of 88,762 in 1941.
Aundh is a town in India 26 mi. southeast of Satara.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bhushangad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bhushangad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Kolhapur Airport (90 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (131 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bhushangad?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bhushangad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bhushangad?
faq.a: Stays in Bhushangad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bhushangad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mhasurne, Aundh State, Aundh, Satara.
